{{CargoRelic
|name=Supreme Member Card
|class_id=20976
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This exclusive pass grants you VIP entry privileges, ensuring you arrive without delays and enjoy the best seats in the house. This card also gives you access to limited memorabilia, an official event guidebook, and a chance to meet athletes up close!
|fame=31
|art=17
|fth=16
|civ=15
|tech=11
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Cathay INTEL LVLs, Snail RUSH +1<br>LVL of Cathay INTEL: 100/100
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 Cathay INTEL LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>LVL of Cathay INTEL: 100/100
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Cathay INTEL LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>LVL of Cathay INTEL: 100/100
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Cathay INTEL LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>LVL of Cathay INTEL: 100/100
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Cathay INTEL LVLs, Snail RUSH +3<br>LVL of Cathay INTEL: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
